rules.name: V-Ray material has no connected textures
rules.message: V-Ray material has no connected texture nodes.
rules.why: Untextured V-Ray materials are valid for debug or flat-color lookdev, but production assets usually need explicit texture coverage before publish.

rules.name: V-Ray material uses displacement
rules.message: V-Ray material has displacement nodes in its network.
rules.why: Displacement-linked V-Ray materials should be reviewed for farm-safe scale and subdivision settings before publish.

rules.name: V-Ray plugin node missing when V-Ray materials are present
rules.message: Scene contains V-Ray materials but no V-Ray settings/plugin node.
rules.why: V-Ray materials require a V-Ray settings node such as VRaySettingsNode for predictable farm rendering and policy validation.

rules.name: V-Ray material displacement requires review
rules.message: V-Ray material has displacement linked in its shading network.
rules.why: Displacement-linked V-Ray materials should be reviewed for farm-safe scale, subdivision, and trace depth before publish.

rules.name: V-Ray material texture count exceeds budget
rules.message: V-Ray material uses more textures than the configured V-Ray texture budget.
rules.why: High texture counts increase IO, memory pressure, and review complexity. V-Ray enrichment tracks texture count separately from generic graph lists for renderer-specific policy checks.

rules.name: V-Ray material reflection trace depth exceeds budget
rules.message: V-Ray material reflection trace depth exceeds the configured budget.
rules.why: High reflection trace depth increases render cost and can hide unstable material settings. Enriched V-Ray metadata exposes trace depth limits for policy review.
